blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Created a data source variable that lists all instances of a data source type
- Used the variable in a panel to dynamically switch between data source instances
- Enabled multi-value selection so users can query multiple instances at once

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Add template variables](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/variables/add-template-variables/) for other variable types like Query, Custom, and Interval
- [Variable syntax](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/variables/variable-syntax/) for advanced formatting and multi-value expressions
- [Manage dashboard links](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/manage-dashboard-links/) to connect variable-driven dashboards together

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Combine data from multiple data sources](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/combine-multi-source-data/)
- [Write SQL expressions to join multi-source data](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/sql-expression-multi-source/)
